title: GoTo
body:
## Languages
**English (default), Italian**

You can edit the chat messages directly from the file *"**/messages/GoTo/<language>.yml**"*

## Commands list
- [gt]  /goto <point>
  - Go to a point
- [pt]  /point new <point> *<point name>*
  - Create a new point
- [pt]  /point set <point>
  - Edit the coordinates of a point
- [pt]  /point name <point> <point name>
  - Give a name to a point
- [pt]  /point rename <point> <new point>
  - Rename a point
- [pt]  /point delete <point>
  - Delete a point
- [pt]  /point view <point>
  - View details of a point
- [pt]  /point list
  - List of your points
- [b]  /back
  - Turn back
